programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A couple create an ambitious floating home, two siblings build their own mobile homes away from home, and George and Will conjure up a magical 30-mile vista in a wall just 20cm thick, in their secret-garden studio flat.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer take a look back on their biggest builds with complete overhauls, including a higgledy-piggledy layout in Huddersfield to wall-to-wall woes in Woodford.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in this new competition in Peterborough is salesman and wannabe rapper Warren Temple, who believes his Spanish menu is good enough to win him the prize.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hippy entrepreneur Donna Trafford is second to host in Peterborough and plans a colourful evening of delicious food and relaxed fun.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On night three in Peterborough, glamour model and columnist Susie Hutson is out to prove shes not the dizzy blonde some of the guests assume she is.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the turn of straight-talking business woman Vicki Culverhouse to host in Peterborough. Having been very direct with the other diners, Vicki surprises the group when she unleashes some poetry at the table.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Veterinary nurse Robin Hills is the final host in Peterborough and hopes his animal-themed night will be a big hit with his guests, as well as his well-presented cuisine.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, first host Lizzy brings the heat with a Mexican-themed night filled with fiesta vibes, a build-your-own burrito bonanza and an unexpected surprise...

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Sally hopes to impress with a Shanghai menu, but one guests starter leaves them tongue-tied. After showcasing her piano skills, can she strike the right chord?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Leon injects some spice with a scorching Caribbean supper. But a fiery main makes a few stomachs rumble. Will his entertainment impress, or will his efforts backfire?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Lindsey serves up some antioxidant-stuffed dishes. But her soup is ruthlessly likened to baby food and her main has one guest retching at the table.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Sheffield, Ambrose hopes that his tried-and-tested dishes can bag him the grand. After a barrage of questions and some cocky competitive chat, has his night won out?

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: A couple create an ambitious floating home, two siblings build their own mobile homes away from home, and George and Will conjure up a magical 30-mile vista in a wall just 20cm thick, in their secret-garden studio flat.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: In the West Midlands, Kirstie helps neurosurgeon Naomi escape from a crowded house-share, while Phil has a challenge on his hands with couple Mo and Jon, who want completely different things.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jill and Ronnie are finally taking the plunge and moving to France. Jasmine Harman lines up five superb options in Languedoc-Roussillon for their £250k budget, but are any perfect for them?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sue and Tony want a holiday bolthole in the French city of Carcassonne. With a property already on their radar, can any of Craig Rowes options for their £100k win them over?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Gary and Alison are looking for a rural holiday home in the Haute-Vienne area of central France. Can Laura Hamilton find them the perfect place for their budget of £100k?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sharon and Brendon want to buy a holiday home beside beautiful Lake Garda, but they each have very different priorities... Can Lucy Alexander fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: Help! I Bought It at Auction with Sarah Beeny
programme.desc: In Nottinghamshire, Laura turns a century-old bungalow with ivy growing under the wallpaper into a dream home. In Stoke-on-Trent, Tariq takes on a former library.

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Artist Sarah returns to her roots in the Durham Dales to create a radical, cannabis-based house. But as costs go through the roof, can she get her hempcrete hub of a home over the line?

programme.title: xXx
programme.desc: An extreme sports junkie is blackmailed by the CIA into taking on a highly dangerous mission to Prague in order to thwart the plans of a group of Russian extremists. The reluctant hero soon finds himself with the safety of the USA in his hands - and a complicated romance on the horizon.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex Experiment
programme.desc: Naturist-loving Jess and Ben explore a non-monogamous lifestyle in the hot tub with Olivia and Gage, where Jess faces a big fear. And Kirsty and Tom consider attending a huge orgy.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: Britain is at war. To stay afloat Emma takes a huge gamble that could cost her far more than her business.

programme.title: A Woman of Substance
programme.desc: As the war rages on, young Emma fights to keep her empire afloat. Is an unlikely alliance her only lifeline? And Emma returns home to Yorkshire for her 80th birthday, armed with a cunning plan.

programme.sub-title: The One Where Underdog Gets Away
programme.desc: Monicas first Thanksgiving dinner for the gang goes horribly wrong when they all get locked on the roof after watching a giant runaway balloon from the New York Thanksgiving parade. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: As New Year approaches, the gang make a pact to celebrate at Monica and Rachels flat without bringing any dates. However, as the New Year gets closer, all of them find themselves breaking that promise except for Ross, who brings along his new pet monkey Marcel.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandlers flamboyant mother visits New York, while Phoebe and Monica flirt with a handsome stranger while crossing a road and end up causing a traffic accident.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: It is an all-out turf war between St Bernards Brodie and Rosie and little cockapoo Jasper. The relentless threat of conflict is stressing everyone out. Graeme revisits Labradoodle Doddle. He also catches up with Ray, Tammy, and Welsh Terrier Henry.

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: As well as tackling canine behavioural issues, Graeme Hall opens his new puppy school, where he works with five new puppy owners. Plus, a hellhound whos tearing a family apart, and viewers doggie dilemmas.

programme.desc: A battle of wills with an un-Saintly Bernard is causing owner Cody to become isolated from her family. And outbursts from social media star Chihuahua Olive are impacting a couple.

programme.title: Volcano
programme.desc: The famous La Brea tar pits start bubbling, the first signs that a dormant volcano beneath the city has come to life, and before long lava is flowing through the sewers and the streets. Taking charge of the disaster is Mike Roark, head of the citys Office Emergency Management, assisted by scientist Dr Amy Barnes and his second-in-command Emmitt Reese. Can they save the city by diverting the threatening lava?

programme.title: Con Air
programme.desc: Set aboard a federal aeroplane transporting convicts to a maximum security facility. One passenger, due for release on parole after eight years in prison, is about to discover that his flight home will turn into a disaster when the prisoners hijack the aircraft. In a race against time, he joins forces with the US Marshal to prevent the criminals from blowing the plane and all on board to pieces.

programme.title: The Travel Show
programme.desc: In 2024 a wildfire swept through Canadas Jasper National Park. As nature begins to reclaim the land and tourists start to return, Qasa Alom finds out how the communitys getting back on its feet.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: The BBCs Breakfast programme features the latest news, sport, business, weather and other items on a daily basis.

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Jeremy Lee, Paul A Young and Roberta dElia, and by special guest Joel Dommett. Drinks expert Olly Smith picks the wines to go with the studio dishes. There are also great moments from the BBC food archive.

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chris cooks Waless highest pancake on Yr Wyddfa, grills a quarrymans supper in Dinorwig Quarry and ends with a landmark whole-cow BBQ in Llanberis.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The new owner of a terrace in Crewe isnt put off by the numerous safety bolts on the front door. The seasoned developer turns it into a smart HMO (house in multiple occupation), while a father-and-daughter team modernise a semi in Doncaster. A former estate agent takes two years to extend and transform a Gravesend house into a smart, boutique-style HMO.

programme.title: BBC Weekend News
programme.desc: National and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: BBC Weather
programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Todays Bargain Hunt comes from Detling in Kent, where Natasha Raskin Sharp is leading proceedings. Caroline Hawley and Raj Bisram give the teams a helping hand as they go in search of profit-making finds to sell at auction. Natasha takes time out with a cup of tea as she checks out Teapot Island, which houses a collection of more than 8,000 novelty teapots, and discovers how they became a kitchen fashion accessory.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Woodworker Bruce has a plan. He has some wood, but can he create luxurious loungers from Jacquis garden furniture bound for the skip?

programme.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
programme.desc: Puss in Boots discovers that his passion for adventure has taken its toll when he learns that he has burnt through eight of his nine lives. Puss sets out on an epic journey to find the mythical Last Wish and restore his nine lives.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: David Attenborough returns to the island of Madagascar on a very personal quest. In 1960 he visited the island to film one of his first ever wildlife series, `Zoo Quest. Whilst he was there he acquired a giant egg - the egg of an extinct bird known as the `elephant bird - the largest bird that ever lived. Fifty years on, he now returns to the island to find out more about this amazing creature.

programme.sub-title: FA Cup, Quarter-Final: Chelsea v Port Vale
programme.desc: FA Cup football as Port Vale of League One travel to Chelsea with a semi-final place at Wembley at stake. The Valiants are the lowest ranked side left in the competition and are struggling at the foot of their division. However, they knocked out Premier League side Sunderland in the fifth round and will be hoping to pull off an even bigger shock against Liam Roseniors Blues in this quarter-final. Kelly Cates presents from Stamford Bridge alongside Jimmy Floyd Hasselbaink and Danny Murphy.

programme.title: Attenboroughs Life in Colour
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the extraordinary ways that some animals use colour to hide and disappear into the background. New science reveals how the Bengal tiger in central India uses its orange-black stripes to hide from its colour-blind prey. In Kenyas Masai Mara, the zebras black-and-white pattern confuses predators with an extraordinary effect called motion dazzle. And on the island of Cuba, a small snail uses colourful stripes in a surprising way to hide from its enemies.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: The new owner of a terrace in Crewe isnt put off by the numerous safety bolts on the front door. The seasoned developer turns it into a smart HMO (house in multiple occupation), while a father-and-daughter team modernise a semi in Doncaster. Caroline Hawley and Raj Bisram give the teams a helping hand as they go in search of profit-making finds to sell at auction. Natasha takes time out with a cup of tea as she checks out Teapot Island, which houses a collection of more than 8,000 novelty teapots, and discovers how they became a kitchen fashion accessory.

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Egg
programme.desc: David Attenborough returns to the island of Madagascar on a very personal quest. In 1960 he visited the island to film one of his first ever wildlife series, `Zoo Quest. Whilst he was there he acquired a giant egg - the egg of an extinct bird known as the `elephant bird - the largest bird that ever lived. Fifty years on, he now returns to the island to find out more about this amazing creature.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Something ghastly is afoot in Victorian Yorkshire, as bodies are found with their skin a waxy, glowing red.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Mike approaches Alison to discuss their finances following the loss of their BandB business. However, Alison is more preoccupied with plotting revenge on the Ghosts for April Fools Day and recruits a playful Humphrey to execute her plans. But who will prove the hardest to fool? Meanwhile, Mike is shocked to find someone from their insurance company on his doorstep - an unannounced visit to check the details of the gatehouse fire. Can Mike convince her that lightning really can strike thrice?

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: In a bid to make some much-needed money, Alison and Mike look into selling some land. The plan proves far from straightforward however, with Lady Button up in arms at the mere thought of losing some of her beloved estate.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Lotto fever has hit Foleys bar, and it doesnt take long before rumours swirl around Finglas that Agnes is the jackpot winner. Meanwhile, a DNA test and the surprise return visit of Cathys childhood friend leaves Agnes with questions.

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Dermot and Maria decide to renew their wedding vows, forcing Agnes to organise the ceremony alongside arch-nemesis Hillary and cope with her high-society demands. Meanwhile, Fathers Damien and Trevor go on a mountain pilgrimage that goes wrong.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet struggles to cope with her loss after Jonny is gunned down by the police, while Louise tries to avoid all blame for the shooting. Meanwhile, grief softens Gazs sex-drive but Donna finds an inventive way to arouse him.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Donna discovers a dreadful secret in her dead mums house, Louise decides to tell Jonny the awful truth about Janet and Gaz, and Jonny gets scared to leave the house.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny gets some very exciting news, Janet and Gaz take extreme measures to stop Louise blackmailing them, and Donna decides to spend, spend, spend, until Gaz drops a bombshell.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonnys new car gives him trouble with women, Donna takes revenge on Gaz for sleeping with Janet, and Louise fights dirty to win Jonnys forgiveness for getting him shot.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Jonny has been banned from the off licence and Louise is fed up that she cant get a job. Donna fears that Kelly may have developed a crush on her.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz gets into trouble when his plans for Jonnys stag night go seriously wrong, and Louise tries to make Janets hen party into the wildest ever.

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: After prison, Coventry musician Pa Salieu returns with renewed purpose and takes the stage at Glastonbury. While he fights to rebuild his career, can music save him again?

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson and James May are set the task of creating a TV advert for Volkswagen. Despite vowing to work together to deliver a classic piece of advertising, the boys quickly fall out on set. Meanwhile, Richard Hammond looks for an alternative to boring Germanic sports saloons and ends up going mostly sideways in the new Vauxhall VXR8 Bathurst. Plus, American chat show legend Jay Leno is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

An entranced Penfold is met by a shadowy figure, Granny Penfold! Penfold recounts his childhood years on Grannys farm, where he was trained in the ancient martial art of Farm Fu; a farming based martial art.

programme.title: Danger Mouse
programme.desc: The Danger Agency realises that a lack of accounting has left them bankrupt. Whilst the bailiffs are in collecting goods from HQ the team decide to hold a telethon, asking people to phone in and donate to order their favourite clips to be played. Their target is a whopping ten million pounds! Can they reach their target in time? And what clip is DM trying to hide?

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: Mouse wants the other kids to stop being lazy and achieve some goals, in the form of breaking world records. With Mouses relentless coaching, the family soon gets carried away. Can Mouse get things back to normal before anyone gets hurt?

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programme.desc: When one of Mouses inventions accidentally sticks Cats discarded fur to Boys face, his new beard suddenly makes him the most popular kid in school. Seeing her chance to stop her enemy, Lila Bird from becoming class president, Girl convinces Boy to run for president too. It looks like Boy might win, until another accident causes Cats whole body to get stuck to his face.

programme.title: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato is due to receive the Best Hero Award, but Evil Pea decides she should get it. Carrot tells her she needs to defeat herself to win the award.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and his friends play nature explorers in Ammas garden by spinning a giant colour wheel and then finding something of that colour in the garden. When its Bings turn to find something red, he doesnt look carefully before he tries to pick a raspberry and pricks his finger.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Pando is at Bings house today and has an earworm called Bingly Bangly. Bing isnt impressed with this, declaring that he is Bing. When Pando cant resist saying the name, Bing knocks Pandos tower over and wants him to go home. But then Flop suggests they try a Thingly song instead.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee masters his ambition of building a model of the Clubhouse out of sticks, so the Squirrels start to think about what their ambitions might be. Norrie wants to learn how to break dance. Happy has always wanted to jump the famous triple puddle splash. Betty has always wanted to teach Mr Cuddles how to speak Portuguese. Roly has loads, from growing a potato to becoming a pirate. Tag spends a long time thinking what his could be, and then it clicks - he needs to climb over the log!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are out walking around in the rain with Duggee and notice a rainbow. But before they know it, its gone and the Squirrels are devastated. They decide to make their own rainbow and go off in search of all the colours from everything around them, including strawberries, carrots and bananas. Duggee shows the Squirrels what he has been working on too, a rainbow cake.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are in the Monteverdi Cloud Forest, exploring the trees and hoping for a glimpse of the beautiful Quetzal bird, but Glitch causes havoc when he orders his Grimbots to search for the Quetzal birds feathers.

programme.sub-title: The Tale of Cotton-tails New Friend

programme.title: Bluey

programme.desc: Tag finds an old book hidden in a tree, it is the Mythical Creature book. The Squirrels and Duggee learn and discover all about Mythical Creatures and how some are a combination of different animals.

programme.desc: Nugget finds a lost mini alien and adopts him as a pet before the others convince her to let it return home. But with his flying saucer broken, how can they send him back to space?

programme.desc: Its been one year since Cosima crash landed on Proxima, but no-one else has remembered this anniversary! Can a perfect picnic jolt their memories?

programme.desc: When a young Watermelonsuchus gets beached during a heatwave, Ginger and the Pea-Rexes get creative to work out a way to get the giant baby into the water.

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania. Owner Ken Pisciotta is in over his head and drowning in debt and unable to get any guests to stay in his neglected establishment.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, Suffolk, run by mother and daughter team, Linda and Kelly Langdown. The BandBers rev their engines when the group try go-karting, and it soon becomes clear that Simon and Pierre have got their eyes on the winners podium.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit is to The Flower Pot, in Sunbury on Thames, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon offer a stylish stay with a certain je ne sais quoi. The guests follow in Henry VIIIs footsteps with a game of real tennis at Hampton Court Palace.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain. Later, the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball, and Nigel is ambushed by Simon, but refuses to surrender.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The fourth visit is to Seaton, Devon, where hosts Pat and Nigel pride themselves on their award-winning breakfast. On arrival, Kelly and Linda have a disappointing point of view and Simon and Pierre point the finger as far as the cleaning goes. That afternoon, the guests ring the changes in a town crying competition.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: With all the visits over, the BandB owners come together to confront their rivals and discover what theyve been paid. The Old Times Guest House starts proceedings and Linda and Kelly Langdown question Simon and Pierres facilities feedback.

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp puts celebs to the test in crafting challenges. Dr Dawn Harper and Dr Ranj Singh have a paper marbling craft-off. Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton make paper gift bags.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Spences new girlfriend Becky, a trainee chef, leads Doug into temptation with her culinary delights, to the annoyance of Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wants to spend a weekend with Doug to honour their first date, but it is the same day as a trip Deacon planned to Atlantic City. Things dont go according to plan for anyone.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Deacon is down in the dumps after his split with Kelly, so Doug takes him out clubbing.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank loses his sense of taste. Is it a side effect of his potency medication, and will he have to tell Marie that he is receiving chemical assistance?

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray tells Robert that Amy talks too much after she chats with Ray for over an hour while he tries to watch a basketball game on TV.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa taunts Bart about his inability to keep a girlfriend, he convinces the family to visit New York City to find Mary Spuckler.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge uncover unexpected details about Grampas past.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: The Movie
programme.desc: When their biggest rival, Humdinger, starts wreaking havoc as the mayor of Adventure City, Ryder and everyones favourite heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Manor House Hotel in Haltwhistle, Northumberland, run by Terry and Rachel. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of the honeymoon suite. But one BandBer has a headboard headache.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers embrace the great outdoors at Orchard Glamping in Garstang, Lancashire. Hosts Tom and Becky hope their pristine pods are pitch perfect. But theres one unhappy camper in their midst.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Tony and Paula host the weeks third visit at Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough, where they reckon stunning sea views and local history will be a winning combination. The breakfast, not so much.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where Dean and Abigail take great pride in their pub. A visit to an old mill proves to be inexplicably popular, but traffic noise gives some of the guests a restless night.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Its payment day, and theres a smorgasbord of slanderous sleep scores, brutal breakfast bombshells and even one couple declining the opportunity to face their competitors. After all that contention, its time to find out whos won.

programme.title: The Boat Race LIVE

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It

programme.desc: Includes sport and weather.

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: Join guests onboard a luxurious vintage train for a trip along the historic Settle to Carlisle line. The journey takes guests through some of Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cumbrias most stunning towns and countryside, and passes over Ribblehead Viaduct.

programme.title: Yorkshire By The Sea
programme.desc: Meet the locals striving and thriving to earn an honest crust on Yorkshires coast. Fishing family the Robsons head to Whitby to repair their boat, and we take a dip in Scarboroughs South Bay with a group of sea swimmers for a full-moon sea swim.

programme.desc: Stanton Carlisle endears himself to a clairvoyant and her mentalist husband at a traveling carnival. He soon hatches a scheme to con a dangerous tycoon with help from a mysterious psychiatrist who might be his most formidable opponent yet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their long-awaited trip to Vermont for Emmas first birthday bash, but problems ensue when Emma falls asleep and a racy cake turns up.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel regrets trusting her self-indulgent little sister Amy with Emma, Monica regrets asking Joey to write a recommendation letter to the child adoption agency for her, and Phoebe accidentally thwarts the anniversary surprise Mike has in store for her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross applies for a palaeontology grant, but discovers that Dr Hobart - who allocates such funding - used to go out with his girlfriend Charlie. Meanwhile, Mike wants Phoebe to get rid of one of her bizarre paintings, but neither Rachel nor Monica is keen to take it, and Chandler lies to Joey about watching his audition tape.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gets upset when Debra shares intimate details about their relationship with her friends.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A modelling agent tells Robert he has a unique look and convinces him to pose for head shots with their `in-house photographer, but when Robert and Ray return for the pictures, they are surprised to find the modelling agency has mysteriously disappeared.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A young man, Sam Gilula, arrives at Frank and Maries and everyone is surprised when he and Frank fondly embrace. Sam explains Frank had been quite an inspiration to him as a lad, and Ray and Robert make fun of Frank, wondering how he could have inspired anyone.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Robert get into tricky territory over who will have responsibility for Marie in the future.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank and Marie announce they are moving into a retirement home and sell their house to Robert and Amy.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray and Debra discover that Frank and Marie are going to be thrown out of their apartment.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray discovers that Debra becomes more passionate when she argues with Marie, so he concocts a series of lies in an attempt to boost his love life.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray has to tell Debra that the PTA has a problem with the way she dresses.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra and Ray are shocked when Ally comes home with an `F on her report card.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Featuring performances from the fantastically talented singer-songwriter, Tom Odell and the queen of comedy, Sarah Millican. Plus, one unsuspecting member of the public will get the surprise of their life when they become the Unexpected Star of the Show. There will also be unmissable new comedy material from Michael himself and Carol Vorderman hands over her phone in celebrity Send to All.

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: Featuring music from rock legend Bryan Adams and superstar Jess Glynne, comedy from one of the UKs top comedians, Josh Widdicombe, and a jaw-dropping British television debut from Canadian acrobatic duo, Chilly and Fly.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Absurd comedy about a likeable buffoon who turns the most ordinary situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment. Mr Bean rushes to his exam only to find out hes studied the wrong subject. He then goes to the beach but struggles to change into his swimming trunks discretely. Later on, he has difficulty attending a church service without drawing attention to himself.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean wants to give a busker some money until he realises he has no change, while afterwards he goes shopping but gets carried away. Later, he treats himself to a birthday dinner but is disappointed with his dish. Finally, Mr Bean attends a royal film premiere in order to meet the Queen, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes to a swimming pool but finds himself terrified of the high diving board; afterwards, he must try several imaginative ways to get out of the car park when he doesnt have enough money to pay. He then demonstrates the proper way to make a sandwich whilst out at the park. Finally, when Mr Bean and his girlfriend go on a date to watch a horror movie he teases her for being scared, until the film actually starts.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean buys a portable television but cant get it to work properly. Then, when his camera is stolen, he must identify the suspect in a police line up. Afterwards, he attends a magic show and disco with his girlfriend but ends up embarrassing her.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean rushes to the dentists office after oversleeping, then helps a boy fix his remote-controlled toy boat, and later is menaced by a wasp while having a picnic.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean resuscitates a heart attack victim at the bus stop, has problems mailing a letter after accidentally swallowing the stamp, and decides to go on holiday.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean goes Christmas shopping, conducts a Salvation Army band, and has Christmas dinner with his long-suffering girlfriend.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean treats himself to a weekend at a posh hotel where he manages to get himself into one embarrassing situation after another.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a childrens charity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but locks everyone out when they turn up late as Joey and Ross went to a hockey game while Rachel and Phoebe took Emma to a baby beauty contest. Monica also receives some adoption news.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler are forced to pretend to be a reverend and a doctor when their prospective childs birth mother gets the wrong end of the stick. Meanwhile, Joeys date with Phoebes friend doesnt go well, and Ross is left with an inappropriate outfit for a date with a sexy salesgirl.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Phoebe and Rachel see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked by the truth.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears as a celebrity contestant on `The $100,000 Pyramid with its actual host Donny Osmond, but Joeys dubious IQ costs his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper, Roy - without seeing him first - for Phoebes bachelorette party. Also, Chandler and Ross attend a college reunion and meet an attractive woman they both promised not to date during school.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Its Phoebe and Mikes big day, but all does not go to plan. Wedding planner Monica is driving the bride to distraction, New York is hit by its worst blizzard for 20 years, and Joey is taking his role standing in for Phoebes incarcerated father far too seriously. Chandler and Ross are upset that neither of them has a role, until Mike needs to replace one of his groomsmen.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler discover that their prospective adoptive childs biological father may be a `shovel killer, Ross and Rachel get dangerously close when they go to visit her sick father, and Phoebe struggles to teach Joey French for an audition.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel makes the mistake of going for a job interview at a restaurant where her current boss is also dining. Phoebe discovers she can change her name to whatever she likes - Princess Consuela Bananahammock seems the logical choice, until Mike proves that two can play her game - and Joey, upset that Chandler and Monica are moving, is comforted by an eight-year-old.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When Rachel makes a startling announcement, Ross secretly schemes to get her former job back for her. Meanwhile, Joey is so flustered by all of the upheaval in his friends lives that Phoebe prevents him from learning about the sudden death of his agent. Monica and Chandler make a stunning discovery after they check out the house for sale next door to their new home.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Nick and Jess must adjust to the lack of personal space when Jess moves into his bedroom, and Cece thinks Abby is taking advantage of Schmidt.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Jess hires, then has to immediately fire Coach as her schools new volleyball coach. Meanwhile, Schmidt gets sued, and Cece catches the eye of a much younger man.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Ike weirdly starts going through puberty, becoming a real pain-in-the-ass to Kyle - maybe an intervention Yo Gabba Gabba style will help!

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: With the biggest shopping day of the year approaching, Wizard Cartman deems it necessary to form alliances in his quest for a new gaming console.

programme.title: South Park
programme.sub-title: A Song of Ass and Fire
programme.desc: The countdown to Black Friday continues and Cartmans attempts at manipulation increase.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Randy is rallying his troops, the zombie masses are restless outside the mall, and King Cartman prepares for battle with Princess Kenny - Black Friday is upon us!

programme.title: Fat Chat
programme.desc: Desiree Burch meets self-confessed `fat and gay comedian Jack Rooke to talk growing up fat, friendships and how fat people can shoplift a `f...-ton of stuff.

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast The Internet
programme.sub-title: Jon Richardson, Ellie Taylor and Fatiha El-Ghorri
programme.desc: ...Internet. Host Iain Stirling is joined by Jon Richardson, Ellie Taylor and Fatiha El-Ghorri for a scathing takedown of pure internet madness, from awkward influencers to social media fails. (S1, E06)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The women pressure Ray and Frank to accompany Robert to one of his therapy sessions. Instead, they head to the racetrack.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra invites her divorced parents over for Thanksgiving. When Ray walks in on them making love, he and Debra assume that they are getting back together, but later when they inform Debra otherwise, an unprecedented turn of events shocks everyone.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray becomes jealous when Marie starts treating Robert better than him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Monkey Gets Away
programme.desc: Rachel accidentally lets Ross pet monkey escape, and the friends form a search party. She is then horrified to learn that her former best friend is engaged to marry her ex-fiance.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Someone is pretending to be Monica, using her credit card numbers and having the sort of fun that Monica wishes she could have.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: When downstairs neighbour Mr Heckles dies, the friends clean out his apartment, but Chandler becomes convinced his hyper-critical nature will mean he ends up alone and sad, just like Heckles.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Phoebes husband - a gay Canadian ice dancer - shows up, as nobody knew she was married. Elsewhere, Chandler reveals his third nipple, and Ross new relationship is under attack, unbeknown to him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Baby on the Bus
programme.desc: Joey and Chandler babysit Ben, who turns out to be a babe-magnet until they accidentally leave him on a bus. Meanwhile, Phoebe loses her job as the singer at Central Perk to Stephanie.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Lesbian Wedding
programme.desc: Rachels free-spirited mother visits and reveals that she wants to end her marriage and experiment sexually. Meanwhile, Carol and Susan prepare for their wedding, with some help from an uncomfortable Ross.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Eddie Moves In
programme.desc: With Joey in his new apartment, Chandler gets a troublesome new flatmate, Eddie. Meanwhile, Phoebe makes a video for `Smelly Cat, and Ross and Monica find it nearly impossible to live together.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Dr Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Joeys remarks to a fan magazine could cause him to lose his job playing Dr Ramoray on a daytime television drama, and Chandlers new flatmate Eddie becomes too annoying to cope with.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Eddie Wont Go
programme.desc: Chandler wants his annoying new roommate to move out, Joey is forced to face some exorbitant bills, and the girls learn from a book about personal empowerment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Old Yeller Dies
programme.desc: Monicas new boyfriend impresses Chandler and Joey, Phoebe finds out what she missed as a child, and Rachel resents the fact that Ross is planning the rest of their lives together.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Jess and Nick face some truths about their relationship, while Schmidt, Winston and Coach scramble to make a better second impression on their hot new neighbors.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: Jess and Nick try to keep their breakup a secret. Meanwhile, Winston passes the police academy entrance exam and demands a celebration.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Absurd comedy about a likeable buffoon who turns the most ordinary situations into moments of excruciating embarrassment. Mr Bean rushes to his exam only to find out hes studied the wrong subject. He then goes to the beach but struggles to change into his swimming trunks discretely. Later on, he has difficulty attending a church service without drawing attention to himself.

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean wants to give a busker some money until he realises he has no change, while afterwards he goes shopping but gets carried away. Later, he treats himself to a birthday dinner but is disappointed with his dish. Finally, Mr Bean attends a royal film premiere in order to meet the Queen, with disastrous results.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Q, Murr and Sal finally clean out their garages before giving truly spooky presentations; in the end, David Cross brings a sense of danger to the losing joker and makes a memory theyre sure to remember.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey stumbles upon a way to impress a famous actor during an audition, Ross learns the identity of a long-ago mugger, and Chandler accepts an internship at a shoe company.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Boob Job
programme.desc: Monica secretly asks Joey for a loan because she and Chandler are strapped for cash, Phoebe invites her boyfriend to move in with her, and Rachels apartment baby-proofing drives Joey crazy.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Memorial Service
programme.desc: When Chandler jokingly posts an outrageous biography about Ross on Ross college alumni website, Ross retaliates in kind, sparking an internet war. Meanwhile, Monica gets extremely vigilant after a weak-willed Phoebe asks for help to stop her from contacting Mike after their relationship ends.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Hoping to win a huge jackpot, the friends pool their money and buy dozens of lottery tickets, but they argue over how to spend the fortune if they win, and Monica irritates everyone else by buying tickets just for her and Chandler. Exasperated, Phoebe takes the bowl of everyones tickets and threatens to throw it off the balcony. The others make up, but a pigeon startles Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A visit to the set of a soap opera inspires Rachel to dream of a romantic encounter with Joey, and Chandler must take Ross on a weekend getaway after Monica is unable to take time off from work.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Ross is excited when he meets a stunning palaeontology professor, but when he takes her to Joeys rooftop party for the actors soap-opera co-stars, she intimidates him with her impressive list of former boyfriends. Meanwhile, Rachel and an intoxicated Monica make fools of themselves at the party chasing after the hunky daytime actors.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler have an embarrassing encounter with an old acquaintance at a fertility clinic, Ross plays Cyrano to help Joey woo a professor, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage hoping Phoebe wont find out.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Disappointed to learn that they cannot conceive a baby naturally, Monica and Chandler consider their options. When Chandler invites a handsome colleague round for dinner, Monica and Chandler embarrassingly interview him as a potential sperm donor. Meanwhile, while shopping with Phoebe, Rachel admits that she still has a thing for Joey.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The gang heads to Barbados for a palaeontology convention where Ross is the keynote speaker. Rachel harbours steamy thoughts about Joey while David prepares to propose to Phoebe.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: While the friends are still in Barbados, Joey tries to tell Ross about his feelings for Rachel and Ross wants to confess to kissing Joeys girlfriend Charlie, but it is easier said than done. Meanwhile, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe can hear their amorous conversations through the hotels paper-thin walls. Also, Monicas hair problems go from bad to worse, and Phoebe has some bad news for Mikes girlfriend on her birthday.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross drinks too much wine while dining with Rachel, Joey and Charlie. Elsewhere, Frank Jr cannot cope with his precocious triplets and pays Phoebe a visit.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey nervously anticipate their first real date, Monica and Phoebe try to avoid an obnoxious friend with a fake British accent, and Ross emerges from a tanning booth with a two-toned appearance.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel gets Monica and Chandler to delay their long-awaited trip to Vermont for Emmas first birthday bash, but problems ensue when Emma falls asleep and a racy cake turns up.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Baby-Sits
programme.desc: Rachel regrets trusting her self-indulgent little sister Amy with Emma, Monica regrets asking Joey to write a recommendation letter to the child adoption agency for her, and Phoebe accidentally thwarts the anniversary surprise Mike has in store for her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross applies for a palaeontology grant, but discovers that Dr Hobart - who allocates such funding - used to go out with his girlfriend Charlie. Meanwhile, Mike wants Phoebe to get rid of one of her bizarre paintings, but neither Rachel nor Monica is keen to take it, and Chandler lies to Joey about watching his audition tape.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Home Study
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler fuss over their apartment as they expect a visit from the adoption worker. Meanwhile, Phoebe and Mike opt for a small wedding and donate the extra money to a childrens charity.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but locks everyone out when they turn up late as Joey and Ross went to a hockey game while Rachel and Phoebe took Emma to a baby beauty contest. Monica also receives some adoption news.

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery
programme.desc: Spoof of 1960s spy films, in which cryogenically preserved secret agent Austin Powers is revived in the present day. Once synonymous with style, Powers soon realises that his vocabulary, fashion sense and attitude to women are hopelessly out of date. He enlists the help of a decidedly modern woman to help him adjust to the 1990s and vanquish his old adversary, Dr Evil.

programme.title: Lee Evans Live: The Different Planet Tour
programme.desc: Lee Evans took his show on a 114 date tour across 63 different towns, finally returning to the West End for one more performance.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Stand up comic and presenter Jimmy Carr is back to oversee the disputes and deliberations on all the topical events that set the great British publics chins wagging. The first guests are British boxing sensation Amir Khan, `The IT Crowds Richard Ayoade, as well as comics Holly Walsh and Josh Widdicombe.

programme.desc: When Samantha Tessla Koenig was abducted by serial killer Israel Keyes in 2012, she was sexually assaulted, asphyxiated and tragically murdered.

programme.title: Imperfect Murder
programme.desc: Investigate the carefully planned schemes of murderers and potential killers which fell apart, ultimately leading to justice being served.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder
programme.desc: When a group of hospital patients dies from natural causes, hospital administrators grow concerned. It takes more than 20 years - and a relentless investigative team -- to convict a killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: If investigators cant find the crack in their suspects seemingly air-tight alibi, a cold-blooded killer will elude justice.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a teenager is found savagely stabbed to death in her home, police hope a trail of blood found at the crime scene will lead them to her killer.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: When a 15-year-old girl vanishes from her front porch, police must uncover when she was last seen, where she might have been going, and who would have wanted her dead.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: The judge charges a defendant with six counts of contempt after he drops six "f-bombs" in court; a woman accused of domestic assault is unhappy with the conditions of her bond; an angry judge yells at a repeat drug offender; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Emotions run high as a grieving daughter confronts her fathers killer in court; the judge questions a woman accused of falsely reporting her boyfriend for domestic battery; a judge catches a defendant lying in court and sends her to jail; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An intoxicated judge attempts to use his connections to get out of a DUI; a man convicted of murder apologises face-to-face to the daughter of his victim; an armed gunman breaks into a local courthouse.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: An inmate accused of murder makes a daring escape attempt; the judge has harsh words for a woman who pretended to have cancer as part of a scam; a man found guilty of DWI shows up 18 minutes late for his sentencing and then interrupts the hearing.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A convict makes a surprise attack; the Portland MAX killer lashes out in court; a defendant trying to escape court is no match for a bulletproof window.

programme.title: Court Cam

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: In Arizona, a scientist turned miner gambles his retirement funds to secure a legacy for his son. Freddy and Juan turn up the heat to fix the miners innovative, self-designed dry washer to save the mine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: With nearly forty years of mining under his belt, Freddy Dodge goes on the road to help struggling mine owners to hit the mother lode. He teams up with Juan Ibarra to overhaul washplants, introduce gold recovery techniques and transform operations.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: A 17-year-old mining prodigy, his father and grandfather wrestle with wintry weather to get their season underway in central Alaska. With another snowstorm brewing on the horizon, Freddy and Juan race to complete fixes before its too late.

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.sub-title: Underwater Robots, Lasagne, Band Saws, and Ski Trekking Poles

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy and Juan
programme.desc: With nearly forty years of mining under his belt, Freddy Dodge goes on the road to help struggling mine owners to hit the mother lode. He teams up with Juan Ibarra to overhaul washplants, introduce gold recovery techniques and transform operations.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.sub-title: Fab Four and a Big Score
programme.desc: A police officers house in North Carolina is packed with fishing gear, rare Beatles records, guns and knives. In Tennessee, sports memorabilia has taken over a familys home; total sales top $100,000. And a client is moved to give Matt a tribute.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team travel to Dedham, ME, to restore a dilapidated camp that was once an old schoolhouse. When a serious case of rot threatens to shut down the project, Chase and Ryan are forced to make an expensive decision.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart destroys the familys Christmas trees and presents, his lies about a burglar stealing them spiral out of control, leaving the Simpsons heavily indebted to the generous townsfolk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa try to soften Homers mood after he inadvertently rents a musical instead of an action movie.

programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This bumper edition for Christmas takes a very merry look back at the best of the Box this year.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The First Dates restaurant welcomes a fresh batch of singletons, including 29-year-old lawyer Arumina, who meets veterinary surgeon Simon, and retired bookmaker David who is paired with retired factory girl Margaret.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Eternal singleton Nicole is determined not go down the same path as a Bridget Jones. At first glance, chartered surveyor Gary is no Mr Darcy, but he assures Nicole that this doesnt make him boring.

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and her husband Ercan face a big decision; should they start a family? Vicky gives motherhood a trial run and sees how her frozen embryos are getting on.

programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan continue to explore whether parenthood is right for them. After speaking with a surrogate and adoptive mum, are they any closer to their decision?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Kent, Katie and her 6ft 7in husband Dan are up first with a menu suited to Dans huge appetite. Day two sees the turn of wedding DJ Simon and his wife Jacqui, and the last to host are city broker Paul and his beauty therapist wife Claire.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmers James and Louisa get the ball rolling in Kent with an all-British home-grown menu. On the second night, competitive Lance and Tina try to build bridges with their sharing and caring-themed menu. Last to host are glamorous Rachel and Keith.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One at a Music Festival
programme.desc: Party-loving Jake wants the ultimate wedding knees-up, but his image-conscious bride-to-be Rosie dreams of a more intimate affair. Jakes festival wedding may not prove a headline act with his intended.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Harry wants a royal wedding and to be King for the day and plans to make his no-nonsense bride his Queen. But, bride-to-be Charlotte wants something low key.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Its high noon for impulsive groom Steve as he plans a cliff-hanger of a wild west wedding to Leona. Will Steves nuptials on a bridge prove a swinging success?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Wight Wedding
programme.desc: Fun-loving groom-to-be Liam wants a wedding day that really celebrates his native Isle of Wight, but his future wife Kandi is hoping for a more conventional day.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But 2000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Paul Damico is President of Moes Southwest Grill, one of the fastest growing restaurant chains in the world, which has 10,000 employees serving over 150,000 guests every day. Here, he goes undercover in his company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: While Boston Market Chief Brand Officer Sara Bittorf is under cover, she terminates an employee and struggles to manage a busy drive-thru window.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owners of J. Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, are $1.2 million in debt and contact chef Gordon Ramsay in hope that he can help give them a fresh start; Gordon teaches the inexperienced cooks how to make various dishes.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to improve the family-run Fiesta Sunrise, a Mexican restaurant in West Nyack, N.Y., with a cockroach-infested kitchen.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsey tackles spoiled food, fake fish and a small customer base when he visits Sante La Brea in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a husband and wife in Chicago with their Cafe 36 restaurant, which is losing money due to a lack of clientele and a head chef who isnt concerned with quality.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay tries to help two inexperienced restaurant owners who run an Italian eatery called Casa Roma in Lancaster, Calif.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Asim Chaudhry take on Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. Lucy Pearman is in Dictionary Corner with Susie. Jimmy hosts. Rachel does her letters and numbers.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Da-da, da-da, da-da-da-da, DOOF! Cats Does Countdown returns. Jimmy Carr hosts as Jon Richardson and Dan Tiernan take on Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. With John Kearns.

programme.title: Greg Davies: Firing Cheeseballs at a Dog
programme.desc: Can a chance encounter with a stray Spanish dog and a bag of crisps lead to an epiphany and a fresh approach to life? Of course it cant, but is that a reason not to build an entire show around it? This show is the first to ever attempt to chronicle an entire life without offering even the slightest insight into the human condition, every significant incident forensically removed to leave only the lean meat of the trivial.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Mannys parents come to stay, much to the displeasure of Bernard, Fran and even Manny himself.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny puts a bet on the Grand National for Bernard, who soon becomes addicted to gambling.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Micky Flanagan, Hari Kondabolu, Tess Daly and Krishnan Guru-Murthy join Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson to delve into the world of polls, surveys and statistics.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr is joined by captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for more polls and laughs. Heston Blumenthal, Hannah Cockroft, Josh Widdicombe and Katherine Ryan guest.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Thai Stag Do
programme.desc: In a bid to save money to put on a show-stopping wedding for Jay, his down-to-earth bride, Jack-the-lad Ian flies himself and his two best men 12,000 miles away to Thailand.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rock-star turned zoo-keeper Scott spends under £100 on Ebay for a wedding dress for his paramedic bride to be, Verity - leaving him £1, 800 to spend on life-size plastic animals to decorate the reception for his jungle themed wedding.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sea-loving groom, Dave wants to whisk his water-phobic bride-to-be, Rosie off to a remote island wedding, but its not just any island, its windswept Lundy Island off the coast of Devon, where the bride once nearly drowned and had to be rescued.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Situated near Lake Tahoe, Squaw Valley is one of the largest ski resorts in the United States. CEO Andy Wirth has been busy merging Squaw Valley with newly acquired mountain resort Alpine Meadows. He dons a disguise to go undercover and find out how the combined operation is running.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Based in Los Angeles, Fatburger is known as the `last great hamburger stand. It began in the 1950s as a late-night hangout for musicians and quickly grew to international success. Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Fatburger, disguises himself to go incognito among his employees.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, Gemma and her `wee-bald man husband Jim serve up a very healthy menu that caters for pescatarians as well carnivores. Second to host are Leeann and her husband Micheal, and finally, Matt and Paul lay on some unique dance routines.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Newlywed am-dram lovers Mel and Richard raise the curtain for this competition in Belfast. Joining them are super-competitive Cherith and David, and rockers done good, Joanne and Jim.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Oasis tribute singer Degsy and his wife Jackie kick things off with a Manchester-themed menu. Second night hosts Jo and Vikki serve an Indian-themed menu, and the final night sees Chris and Bex stepping up to the plate.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: South African-born Nigel, and his wife Nikki, kick off the competition in South Wales. Day two sees Darren and Simon attempt to woo their guests with a flavour of their first-class lifestyle, and finally its Neil and Carlys chance to impress.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay returns to some of the most memorable restaurants in the past to see if theyve implemented positive changes.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to America in a bid to rescue failing restaurant owners from imminent disaster and provide them with a recipe for success. In this first episode, Gordon visits the Hot Potato Cafe in Fishtown, Philadelphia. With no profit made in its two years of trading and an influential restaurant reviewer dubbing them `Spuddy Hell, Gordon soon realises Hot Potato may have had its chips.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Flamangos in rural Whitehouse, New Jersey. Mother and daughter owners Adele and Cheryl are stuck in their tropical ways but their restaurant is far from paradise. They are in deep financial trouble and Adele struggles to get on with her staff, is disappointed by her chef and hates Gordon with a passion. Gordon has one last chance to bring them all around and make the restaurant a success.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Bazzini restaurant in Ridgewood, New Jersey. Owner Paul Bazzini was an award-winning chef in New York who decided to run his own restaurant but he never realised how difficult the change would be. Now, he finds everyday tasks overwhelming and his passion for food is in danger of being extinguished by the daily grind. However, passion isnt the only problem in this failing restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. Owners Marcelo and Kata used to be married to each other but now fight over everything. Seven years ago, the couple were happy newlyweds and the restaurant was their shared dream, but now the passion has gone and theyre constantly at each others throats, with their staff getting caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Jon Richardson and Rosie Jones take on Joe Wilkinson and Phil Wang. Dr John Cooper Clarke joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. With Rachel Riley.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a festive edition of the comedy panel show. Rob Beckett, Tom Allen and Liam Charles take on Katherine Ryan, Scarlett Moffatt and Maisie Adam.

programme.title: Jordan Gray: Is It a Bird?
programme.desc: Jordan brings her comedy to TV for the first time. Shot in her home town theatre in Essex, this transgender stand up special is a whirlwind of music and comedy covering politics to Batman.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny is extremely proud of the travel writing festival that he has organised - everybody loves Jason the explorer. Meanwhile, Bernard hires an assassin to take care of his neighbour.

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny and Fran are determined to go out and do something for once, and even persuade Bernard to go to a party. However, a nasty surprise awaits Bernard when he return home.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: A topical panel show based on a huge series of opinion polls carried out around Britain. Jason Biggs, Nicola Adams, Nick Helm and Rob Beckett guest.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: A topical panel show based on a huge series of opinion polls carried out around Britain. With guests Micky Flanagan, Stephen Mangan, Natalie Cassidy and Humphrey Ker.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica, Barry, Geoff and the gang go on a spring break trip and things dont go as expected. Adam questions if college is for him when his test scores are not as good as he was hoping for.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King
programme.desc: Business rival and nemesis `Formica Mike attempts to make an offer Murray cant refuse. Adam offers Ms Cinoman his and Ericas original show when William Penn cannot secure the rights to a well-known spring musical.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Sonny is a party fanatic. How will his bride Jasmine greet his plans for a zoo-themed Ibizan beach party with body paint?

programme.title: LEGO Masters: Australia
programme.desc: Its time for the finale, and the three Grand Master teams have 28 hours to showcase their skills with their most impressive builds yet.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: In Kerala, the teams tackle tiger stripes, stick strikes and tuk-tuks, before tucking into a bounty of bananas! But a careless mistake could cost one duo dearly.

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Jazz decides its time to come clean about her feelings, but how will Inga react? Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs. And Freddys torn between Angus and Jack.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Sebastians, a pizzeria in the heart of movie land in Burbank, Los Angeles, and goes head-to-head with the owner to simplify the menu.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon comes to the aid of Finn McCools, a traditional family-run Irish pub in the The Hamptons, and makes drastic changes that could affect the family forever.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit, leaving the experiment permanently shaken.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two new couples join the experiment. But when big personalities clash, the marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun...

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe make decorated traybakes, tarte tatin and recreate their childhood toys in biscuits.

programme.title: Toy Story 2
programme.desc: Woody is kidnapped by a toy collector, so Buzz Lightyear and the other toys set out in hot pursuit. When Woody meets new friends, including Jessie the feisty cowgirl, will he decide he prefers his new life after all?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: During a school archaeological dig, Lisa finds the skeleton of an angel on the site where a new shopping mall is to be built. Homer takes it home and, while the experts argue over its validity and the clerics its divinity, people flock to see it until one day the angel flies away.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job with Lionel Hutzs Red Blazer Realty, an estate agency, but begins to question her morals when she has to sell properties to her friends that arent quite up to scratch. Despite this, she still manages to convince the Flanders to move to the quaintly named Murder House.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart destroys the familys Christmas trees and presents, his lies about a burglar stealing them spiral out of control, leaving the Simpsons heavily indebted to the generous townsfolk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa try to soften Homers mood after he inadvertently rents a musical instead of an action movie.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Bart invite fairground workers to live at their house.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: When Marge is mugged, she reacts by working out with weights, but goes too far and ends up as a steroid-crazed bully.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Once again, some of Britains best-loved personalities turn their hand to being the countrys most opinionated viewers as they hit the couch for this weeks top TV.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This bumper edition for Christmas takes a very merry look back at the best of the Box this year.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: The First Dates restaurant welcomes a fresh batch of singletons, including 29-year-old lawyer Arumina, who meets veterinary surgeon Simon, and retired bookmaker David who is paired with retired factory girl Margaret.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Eternal singleton Nicole is determined not go down the same path as a Bridget Jones. At first glance, chartered surveyor Gary is no Mr Darcy, but he assures Nicole that this doesnt make him boring.

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and her husband Ercan face a big decision; should they start a family? Vicky gives motherhood a trial run and sees how her frozen embryos are getting on.

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan continue to explore whether parenthood is right for them. After speaking with a surrogate and adoptive mum, are they any closer to their decision?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs company puts her up at a new luxury apartment building with a number of high-profile residents that the family is eager to take advantage of. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil visits his dad after he hears some worrying news. Meanwhile, Jay takes Claire and Mitch on a stroll down memory lane.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: While throwing a telethon at their college, Barry attempts to woo Ren by promising to get Hall and Oates to perform. Beverly attempts to set Bill up, but things go awry when he finds happiness with a woman he meets through Beverlys enemy.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Breas relationship is going well until Beverlys over-involvement causes them to fake a break up. Lainey is back, which throws Barry for a loop regarding his blossoming relationship with Ren.

programme.title: Hollyoaks: Omnibus
programme.desc: Can Warren trust Jenson? Diane makes a decision. Cleo struggles to re-adjust to life at home. And Donny proposes to Misbah, but its not long before their bubble bursts...

programme.title: Patrick
programme.desc: A teachers life gets turned upside down when she inherits her grandmothers cute but mischievous pug.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay works his magic on a New York state eatery that has been renovated but still has horrible service and food.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Giuseppes, a family-run Italian restaurant in Macomb Township, Mich., that has a chaotic atmosphere in the kitchen and a lack of clientele; to spread word about the restaurant, Giuseppes hosts a bowl-a-thon.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Ramsay visits the Handlebar Restaurant and Lounge in Mount Sinai, N.Y., where the owners are in denial about its outdated decor and the head chefs lack of passion.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The two new couples go honeymooning, featuring an unlikely third wheel, frank confessions, and a groom with views that infuriate his new wife.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Three new couples prepare for their first dinner party. But after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge invites Ralph Wiggum over for a play-date with Bart. When Bart goes back to the Wiggum household and finds it filled with police equipment and files, he is in a troublemakers paradise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer gets into deep water when he joins the naval reserve after getting fired from the nuclear plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is drawn into a cult called the Movementarians and expects to be taken to another planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The children of Springfield are shipwrecked on an island in a parody of `Lord of the Flies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty shuns his old routines in favour of edgier material and suddenly becomes the hottest comic in show business.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is arrested for an insurance scam that Moe hatched to impress his new girlfriend.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa fears she is genetically doomed to lose her intelligence.

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Brand-new series: In the Malaysian island paradise of Langkawi, the celebs brave a bat cave, and a fruit basket leaves a bitter taste. But will a wrong turn seal one teams fate?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart, Martin and the bullies are on the run for their lives when a wilderness weekend takes a chilling turn.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: You Wont Believe What This Episode Is About -- Act Three Will Shock You!
programme.desc: When Homer is erroneously blamed for leaving Santas Little Helper locked in a hot car, footage of the incident goes viral, outraging all of Springfield and making Homer a pariah.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: Pete Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navys top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Edinburgh musician Jamie is tired of the life of groupies and flings and seeks a deeper connection. Jasmin from Bognor has ME, a chronic fatigue illness, and needs acceptance from a new lover.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d Fred and his team open the doors of the First Dates restaurant to more hopeful singletons, including 38-year-old party boy Danny, straight-talking hairdresser Lauren, 33-year-old liver bird Emma and 39-year-old ex-Navy gunner Ian.
