programme.title: Glass
programme.desc: David Dunn looks to deliver vigilante justice to the Beast -- the madman who has superhuman strength and 23 personalities. Their epic showdown leads them to the mysterious Elijah Price, the criminal mastermind who holds critical secrets for both men.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Jason and the Argonauts
programme.desc: Jason encounters many a mortal foe in his search for the magical Golden Fleece, which will restore his fathers throne to its rightful owner. Along the way, he wrestles with a multitude of monsters, including a giant living statue and sword-wielding skeletons.

programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: The secretive Men in Black are agents charged with regulating the aliens who have settled on Earth and ensure that they remain undetected. New recruit J and his partner K must find and stop an intergalactic terrorist bent on assassinating two ambassadors from opposing galaxies before they can make peace.

programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Sequel to the sci-fi comedy about a top secret government task force set up to deal with unruly extraterrestrials. An MIB agent turns to the only man who can help him save the world from a rampaging, shape-shifting alien which has taken on the outward appearance of a sexy lingerie model.

programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J goes back to the swinging 60s in a time-travelling mission to save his partner from a murderous alien.

programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black have expanded to cover the globe, but so have the villains of the universe. When aliens that can take the form of any human arrive on Earth, H and M embark on a globe-trotting adventure to save the agency -- and ultimately the world.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: Ace assassin Arthur Bishop becomes a target when he agrees to teach reckless Steve the art of contract killing.

programme.title: Heat
programme.desc: An elusive master criminal and his gang carry out a series of high-profile robberies, one of which culminates in three deaths. programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Mary explores the wonderful foods that bring each different community together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, like mouth-watering Roast Lamb, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community break the fast with Tsoureki bread; spends a day with the Archbishop of York, John Sentamu, cooking up a storm in his kitchen; and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, and a plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: Mary Berry is throwing a casual weekday supper. Her Mediterranean platter of houmous, bread sticks, roasted vegetables and a tomato and mozzarella salad is perfect food for sharing on a summers evening.

programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: Soothing and much-loved home comfort delights, from the very simple to the extremely decadent. Mary indulges her love of comfort food with homely recipes to warm the heart including eggs benedict florentine, fall-off-the-bone slow-cooked lamb shanks and deliciously rich chocolate truffle pots. She invites Swedish fire-chef Niklas Esktedt to share the joys of cave-man cooking with her, and enjoys his inventive venison meatballs with blackened celeriac and mouth-watering Swedish donuts.

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel Roux Jr showcases the unique cuisine of Southern France. He shares his secrets to easily mastering French country cooking at home.

programme.title: Roux Down the River
programme.desc: Michel Roux enjoys the high life, cooking up a lamb stew, roast duck, halibut with saffron and sherry, and a summer pudding.

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom Kerridge picks popular items on the menus at modern British pubs and gives them his own twist. He takes inspiration from modern gastropubs to create simple, contemporary, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Tom celebrates spring with a Sunday lunch classic: roast lamb. He slow-cooks it over layers of thinly sliced potatoes, served with a delicious cheesy broccoli gratin.

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch
programme.desc: Chef Tom Kerridge shares his step-by-step guide for cooking up the perfect Sunday lunch, from the amazing main meal to an indulgent pudding to wrap things up.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows us how to make easy and delicious meals cooked in just one pan, pot or dish, starting with frying-pan pasta, a twist on a fish pie and a sublime roast lamb feast.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver takes midweek meals up a notch, as he knocks out flavour-packed gnocchi and giant spicy meatballs, and turns a family favourite on its head with his upside-down fish pie.

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: Jamies back with delicious dishes to bring friends and family together. He makes rainbow tomato crostini, an epic roasted lamb shoulder, strawberry panna cotta and mango caipirinhas.

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: The average price of the recipes in this episode is just £1.96 per portion. Jamie cooks up a roast shoulder of lamb with all the trimmings and turns the leftovers into Moroccan-style crispy pastillas.

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a clever spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with Jamies spicy, smoky BBQ baked beans with sweet potatoes. Theres scrumptious lamb biryani and a Vietnamese-style salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie cooks lamb lollipops, curry sauce, rice and peas, plus prawn linguini and Sicilian shaved fennel salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Lamb Tagine and Chicken Caesar Salad
programme.desc: On the menu are quick lamb tagine, pan-fried aubergine and cumin crunch, plus crispy polenta chicken caesar salad.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.sub-title: Lamb Kofte and Keralan Veggie Curry
programme.desc: On the menu this time is lamb kofte, pitta and greek salad, and Keralan veggie curry, poppadoms, rice and minty yoghurt.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie rustles up lamb meatballs, chop salad and harissa yoghurt, plus a delicious chicken salad.

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.sub-title: Fishcakes, Linguine, Lamb Chops, Chocolate Mousse
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes quick Asian fishcakes, lemony courgette linguine, sticky lamb chops and a supercharged cherry chocolate mousse.

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver cooks up a tender lamb shoulder, super green spaghetti, one-pan fabulous fish and apple crumble cookies.

programme.title: Jamies Quick and Easy Food
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver makes high-speed ginger shakin beef, crispy squid and smashed avocado, pork and mash gratin, and almond, orange and polenta cake.

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver shows us how to make easy and delicious meals cooked in just one pan, pot or dish, starting with frying-pan pasta, a twist on a fish pie and a sublime roast lamb feast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: This trip, Guys getting a taste of every meal from dawn to dusk. In Long Beach, Calif., the gastropub marrying pork belly with octopus and serving up slam dunk short ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In New Yorks Lower East Side, pickling, smoking, curing and fermenting, everything from the goat necks to chicken wings, in Eureka, Calif., Mediterranean favourites, in Miami, Fla., whole fried snapper and beer braised baby back ribs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: A basement joint serves waffles with their fried chicken; a Cuban joint serves salt cured beef dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: In Denver, a short-rib burger and a savoury apple strudel, in Tempe, goat and tandoori chicken, in Philadelphia, chicken pie and grilled octopus.

programme.title: Jamies 15 Minute Meals
programme.desc: Jamie makes his best fish baps, mushy peas and tartare sauce. Later, he cooks mushroom farfalle with blue cheese and a hazelnut and apple salad.

programme.title: Adam Richman Eats Italy
programme.desc: Adam is in Rome to taste the most iconic foods named after this city. He tucks into one of the best local pasta dishes, cacio e pepe, and porchetta Romana, which is suckling pig Rome style. Plus, he tries gelato, the way the Romans make it.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The 2012 competition enters its final week. The winners of the regional heats compete for a chance for their dish to be on the final banquet menu at a prestigious event hosted by Sir Steve Redgrave with a glittering guest list of British Olympians. Here, the finalists cook their starters, which will be tasted and scored by the `Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Richard Corrigan.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The eight winners of the regional heats prepare to cook their fish dishes, which will be tasted and scored by the `Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Marcus Wareing. Before they get into the kitchen, they must first learn whether they will all be cooking.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: On day three, the chosen finalists cook their main courses, which will be tasted and scored by the `Great British Menu judges and veteran judge Tom Kerridge.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its desserts day in the finals, and the last chance for the competing chefs to impress the judges and veteran Angela Hartnett. After a hard-fought week, the end of this programme will see the judges finally reveal the winning four dishes which will make up this years `Great British Menu.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: This final programme follows the successful chefs in the run-up to the Olympic banquet at the Old Royal Naval College in Greenwich, as they make the painstaking preparations for what is one of the most important meals they will ever cook. The four winning chefs prepare an outstanding four-course menu for a truly Olympian guest list.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The spotlight is on Scotland. Returning contenders Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Mark Greenaway are all determined to get one of their dishes to the banquet. Will a witty take on spiced ham score highly, or will a warm chicken salad with a twist or a rabbit terrine come out on top? Veteran judge Angela Hartnett MBE will be judging.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Returning contenders Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Mark Greenaway cook their fish dishes. Will a traditional Scottish soup, a chowder or a risky no-cook mackerel dish impress veteran judge Angela Hartnett MBE?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The competition heats up as the three returning Scottish contenders, Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Mark Greenaway, cook their main courses. An African inspired goat tagine, a beef dish inspired by a childhood cartoon and a duck dish with a comedy twist are dished up for veteran judge Angela Hartnett MBE.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Scottish returning contenders Michael Smith, Tony Singh and Mark Greenaway have just one more chance to impress veteran judge Angela Hartnett MBE and win their place in front of the judges. Will a comedy custard pie, a sophisticated chocolate dessert or doughnuts inspired by a Scottish tradition come out on top?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Only one chef can make it through to the national finals to represent Scotland and cook at a special banquet at the Royal Albert Hall.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The curtain raises on the competition in the North West. How will Aiden Byrnes dish entitled `Mad as a Box of Frogs go down with veteran Phil Howard? Will he trounce Mary-Ellen McTagues crab starter or will Chris Hollands `Oriental style beef broth with a twis score more highly with Phil?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The North West chefs cook their fish courses. Will Aiden Byrnes `The Culinary Joke - a take on a classic prawn cocktail - raise a laugh, or will Mary-Ellen McTagues dish of dover sole or Chris Hollands `Gone Fishing salmon dish prove winners?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs cook their main course. Will Aiden Byrnes witty beef dish entitled `Long Horn Beef with Noodle Pot prove a winner, or will Mary-Ellen McTagues goat dish called `Our Kid raise a smile? Perhaps Chris Holland will score highly with his dish called `A Tasting of Pork.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the chefs last chance to impress before the final two are chosen to face the `Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will help get them through? Will it be Aiden Byrnes pineapple dish called `The Sweet Burger, Mary-Ellen McTagues take on a trifle called `Chamomile Lawn or Chris Hollands dish called `Going Bananas?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the North West. One chef has already left the competition and only two remain. The judges are joined by celebrity guest judge writer, presenter and performer Rowland Rivron.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: In central England, three culinary heavyweights return to the `Great British Menu kitchen. Two Michelin star chef Daniel Clifford creates a dish called `A Trip to the Chippy, where nothing is as it first appears. That is also the theme for Michelin star chef Richard Bainbridges starter, `banana split, while Will Holland offers up goats cheese mousse, balsamic jelly and gingerbread.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Here, the chefs try to impress with their fish courses. Daniel Clifford puts up a creative dish called `Catch of the Day. Does Richard Bainbridges dish titled `Tongue in Cheek live up to its comedy name? Will judge Marcus Wareing find the comedy value in Will Hollands coconut poached brill, crab, celeriac and tomato essence?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs in central England cook their main courses. Daniel Cliffords main has the same title as Richard Bainbridges fish course, `Tongue in Cheek, but it is a wildly different plate of food; Richard Bainbridge presents guinea fowl in a beef bladder and calls the dish `Which Came First: the Chicken or the Egg; Will Holland offers roast longhorn beef rib eye, bread and bone marrow pudding and parsley paste.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The chefs in central England have one last chance to impress Marcus Wareing before the final two are chosen to face the judging panel. Will Daniel Cliffords `Going Out with a Bang be good enough? Has Richard Bainbridge dropped the comedy ball with his coffee and chocolate dessert called `Time to Reflect? Or will an unusual dish of parsnip banoffee cake, chocolate tart and parsnip ice cream get Will Holland through?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the central England region. Only two chefs remain to cook their entire menus for judges Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton. The panel is joined by guest judge, comedian and actor Jim Moir, known to millions as Vic Reeves.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The South West chefs battle it out for a chance to cook at the special banquet. Will veteran judge Tom Kerridge like Chris Edens modern twist on `Duck a lOrange, or will he favour Peter Sanchez-Iglesias dish called `Picnic? Perhaps Emily Watkinss witty dish called `Eggs and Ham will prove a winner.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The South West chefs cook their fish courses here. Cornishman Chris Eden takes inspiration from home to create a lobster and oyster dish called `Gone Surfing, Peter Sanchez-Iglesias cooks up a dish inspired by childhood memories titled `Fish and Chips, while Emily Watkins serves up a dish with cured trout called `High Tea.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The South West chefs cook their main courses and veteran Tom Kerridge is looking for perfection. Will Chris Edens spin on a fast food classic simply called `B.L.T gain top points? Or will Peter Sanchez Iglesias nostalgic dish `Roast Dinner or Emily Watkins venison dish `Shoot Lunch prove a winner?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: For the South West chefs, which dessert will progress? Peach melba, apple pie and `Lolly and Sweets fight it out.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the South West and only two remain. Who will cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton and their guest, writer and performer Simon Day? The judges arent easily pleased and only world-class cooking will do.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Welsh chefs raise the curtain with their starters, but which one is going to produce a showstopper? All three contestants have created sophisticated plates of food with simple dish titles. Will veteran Jeremy Lee be impressed with Richard Daviess chicken salad or will Mary Ann Gilchrists peas and ham or Luke Thomass ham, egg and pineapple get them off to a flying start?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Welsh chefs cook their fish course. Richard Davies serves up grilled and tartare of mackerel, while Mary Ann Gilchrist serves a lobster dish and calls it `The Great Escape. Luke Thomas is hoping that his quirky take on a classic fish finger will impress veteran Jeremy Lee too.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The Welsh chefs prepare their main courses, but will any of them impress veteran Jeremy Lee enough to give them a top score? Richard Daviess dish is simply called `A Tasting of Pork, Mary Ann Gilchrists `Threes a Crowd doesnt give much away, while Luke Thomass dish is called `Beef, Bone Marrow and Watercress.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the final chance for the Welsh chefs to impress Jeremy Lee with their dessert dishes. Which creation will help get two chefs through to the judging show? Will it be Richard Daviess strawberries and cream with a Comic Relief twist, or will Mary Ann Gilchrists `Some Like It Hot or Luke Thomass rhubarb and custard get them through?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Great British Menu continues as 24 of the nations finest chefs battle it out to cook gastronomic masterpieces that are also witty and fun. Their dishes have to put a smile on faces as they compete for the prize of cooking a dish at a special banquet at the Royal Albert Hall celebrating 25 years of Comic Reliefs Red Nose Day appeals. It is decision time for the chefs representing Wales.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Three North East chefs all want to top the leader board on day one with their starter. How will Colin McGurrans tomato gazpacho and garden salad perform? Stephanie Moon thinks she also has a chance with a witty chicken dish called `Why Did the Chicken..., and Charlie Lakin offers a controversial duck dish called `Mind Your Step.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The North East chefs cook their fish courses. Will former champion Colin McGurrans dish of cockles and mussels with salmon, inspired by his childhood memories, also inspire veteran judge Jason Atherton? Or perhaps Stephanie Moons fish dish with a nod to one of the most famous gags of all time, crab custard pie, will be the winner? Charlie Lakin is also confident with his creation called `Tongue in Cheek.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The North East chefs cook their main course and veteran Jason Atherton is looking for perfection. Will Colin McGurrans dish of duck and turnips be funnier than it sounds? Has Stephanie Moon dropped the comedy ball with her venison dish called `Behind the Fun is Some Serious Game? Will Charlie Lakins kebab inspired dish `A Night on the Tiles raise a smile?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the North East chefs last chance to impress before the final two are chosen to face the `Great British Menu judging panel. Which desserts will help get two chefs through to the showdown? Will it be Colin McGurrans tiramisu, Stephanie Moons tricky pulled sugar dome, or Charlie Larkins custard pie?

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from the North East. One chef has already left the competition and only two remain. They must now cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges Prue Leith, Matthew Fort, Oliver Peyton and their guest, comedian Tim Brooke-Taylor. The judges arent easily pleased and only world class cooking will do.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The curtain raises on the competition in Northern Ireland. How will Chris Fearon cope competing against his former head chef Raymond McArdle? Will rising star Ian Orr be caught up in the middle? Both Chris and Raymond create very different takes on soup while Ian comes up with a rabbit dish.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: The three Northern Ireland chefs cook their fish courses. Chris Fearon serves up a creation called `Stitched up Like a Kipper, while Raymond McArdle draws inspiration from a view from home and serves turbot called `A Day at the Beach. Ian Orr creates a dish with a play on an old joke called `Why Did the Scallop Cross the Roe.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its time for the main course. Chris Fearons dish called `Cowboy Supper is inspired by the Wild West. Raymond McArdle creates a dish called `Titanic Smoked Venison, Tongue and Cheek, and Ian Orr cooks lamb and baked hay.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its the chefs last chance to impress before the final two are chosen to face the `Great British Menu judging panel. Which dessert will it be? Chris Fearons dish inspired by comedy legend Tommy Cooper called `Just Like That? competes against Raymond McArdles `Chocolate Volcano Mountain and Ian Orrs `Passion Egg.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from Northern Ireland. One chef has left the competition and only two remain. Who will cook their entire menus for the `Great British Menu judges, Prue Leith, Matthew Fort and Oliver Peyton? They will be joined by celebrity guest judge writer and performer Charlie Higson and the judges arent easily pleased.

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.desc: Its decision time for the chefs from Northern Ireland. One chef has left the competition and only two remain. programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The fictitious vampire Dracula was based on a real Romanian prince, famous for both his cruelty and courage. The astounding empire built by the fearsome warlord is recreated.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: The US had to beat the Nazis in the race to create an atomic bomb. They built many secret nuclear facilities. Here, the controversial sites are recreated.

programme.title: Heinrich Muller - Head of the Gestapo
programme.desc: Heinrich Muller, WWI veteran and Freikorps member, rose to power and aligned with Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Hitlers Lost Battles
programme.desc: A look at the strategic decisions made by Hitler during the Battle of Britain, which led to Operation Barbarossa, and the Axis invasion of the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Hitlers Lost Battles
programme.desc: The poor military decisions made by Hitler started to become clear by 1942. America got involved in the conflict as a reaction to his declaration of war, as they made ground in North Africa.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler had long been expecting an Allied attack on north-western France, but his problem was knowing when and where it would come. This episode takes a look at the Allied operations Bodyguard and Overload.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Concentrates on Hitlers attempts in the latter end of 1944 to shift the balance of power back in his favour.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.title: Angels of the Sky
programme.desc: World War II pilots from the 8th Air Force share their harrowing experiences in POW camps after being shot down behind enemy lines, including their attempts to escape.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific
programme.desc: The United States fights back following the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor on Dec. 7, 1941; a new form of naval warfare is launched.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific
programme.desc: The United States achieves naval superiority over Japan by the summer of 1942; Japan refuses to surrender despite the great loss of life.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific
programme.desc: Japan refuses to yield as the war turns the United States way; a secret American weapon offers a way out of the conflict.

programme.title: Swordfish: World War IIs Surprising Aircraft And The Raid That Changed History

programme.title: The Boys of H Company

programme.title: U-Boats: The Wolfpack/B-17: The Flying Fortress
programme.desc: A closer look at two of WW2s most terrifying and influential war machines.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.desc: Canadian Armoured Corps tanks come to Romes aid in the battle against the Nazis.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles
programme.sub-title: Tank Battles of the Vietnam War

programme.desc: Dion Dublin has a hair-raising experience at a barbers in Rochdale, Lancashire, while Martin Roberts looks round a great bungalow in Alsager, Cheshire, and Lucy Alexander sees all the potential in a piece of land in Eccles in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin Roberts visits a house in Otterton, Devon, which is given a stunning transformation to match the views from the windows, Lucy Alexander looks round a small one-bedroom flat in Tottenham, London, and Dion Dublin peers into a building in Alvaston, Derby, which is in a dangerous state of disrepair.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A two-bedroom detached house in Basford in Nottingham, a top floor flat in Portsmouth and a large Edwardian terrace in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. Martin, Lucy and Dion meet the new owners and hear about their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A multimillion-pound development in Farningham in Kent, an ambitious, total renovation project in Aspatria in Cumbria and a very small studio flat in Wallington in Surrey are all sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the new owners to discuss their plans.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A Victorian terrace in Londons Greenwich, two flats in Chatham in Kent and a riverside inn near Great Yarmouth in Norfolk are all sold under the hammer. Martin Roberts, Lucy Alexander and Dion Dublin meet the new owners and hear plans for their renovation projects.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A three-bedroom house in Borrowash in Derbyshire, another three-bedder in West Bromwich in the Midlands and a quirky four-bedroom house on the Isle of Sheppey are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A mid-terrace house in Wales, a basement office in central London with a huge price tag and two flats in Bootle near Liverpool are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Disappeared
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old college sophomore Martin Roberts is a popular fraternity brother, then he goes missing, leaving behind a cryptic note. Two years later, Roberts family remains desperate to know what happened to him.

programme.title: Disappeared

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: When Alessia Mesquita reconnects with her childhood crush, Rashod Newton, the couple fall desperately in love. But the romance becomes overshadowed by Rashods unpredictable behaviour.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: India Mackey live streams her life for all to see, but behind her smile on camera, her relationship with her boyfriend Kevin Dixon is painful. A day after her 20th birthday, India sees Kevins true face.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: Unsuspecting 17-year-old Mary Jayne Jones moves to small town in Iowa and gets a job waiting tables. She makes the mistake of believing that theres good in everyone, and it will cost her her life.

programme.desc: Jessica Jaramillio escaped her abusive ex-husband Chad Graves, but a joint custody agreement for her children means he will always be in their lives. His increasingly obsessive behaviour reveals he is not who he presents himself to be.

programme.title: Agatha Christies Marple
programme.desc: Miss Marples bloodhound instincts are triggered when a friend travelling by rail from London witnesses a murder on a passing train. When the police do not find a body, Miss Marple suspects it to have been dumped in the grounds of the Crackenthorpe Estate.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Martin expresses some negative views when Louisa reveals she will be interviewing for the headteachers job and Pauline worries that something is up when Al behaves in a secretive manner, and is later seen semi-naked in Louisas home. A well-to-do couple come in to the surgery to ask Martin to grant them a disabled parking permit for the village, but a mishap sees them leave in disgust and cause mayhem in town.

programme.title: Rosemary and Thyme
programme.desc: The picturesque village of Rowfield is a hotbed of turmoil and dissent as the Garden Open Day Scheme approaches. As Rosemary and Laura investigate why the contestants gardens are all afflicted with the same blight, the previous years winner is found dead.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When council clerk Martin Barrett is shot dead, Barnaby and Jones discover that he was an expert blackmailer. They investigate which of his victims hated him enough to kill him, and the trail leads to Fennacombe Bay. Why are Richard and Maggie Florian spending so much time at sea, and could police committee chairman Sir John Waverley have a scandalous past? With the help of Barnaby, they intend to find out.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When Midsomer Worthys baritone Connor Simpson is killed just days before a competition, the rest of the choir, including Joyce Barnaby, are in fear for their lives. Barnaby and Jones investigate and find an atmosphere of bitter rivalry and tense marital relationships. Then, theres another murder and the race is on to catch the killer before the choral showdown.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Controversial plans to build a supermarket in Elverton-cum-Latterly lead to murder when a man is stabbed to death and the pollution advisor for the site seems to be spending more time with the women of the village than at work. Can Barnaby and Jones discover the truth and learn what is really polluting Elverton?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby begins to question the guilt of a Midsomer Malham woman who is on trial for the murder of her best friend. The evidence is stacked against her, but she doesnt appear deluded or obsessed with the dead womans husband as the prosecution claim. With the help of a frail pensioner - the key witness, can Barnaby and Jones discover what really happened on the night of the murder?

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: All is not as it seems when DCI Vera Stanhope investigates the case of a wealthy betting shop tycoon who was murdered during a home invasion in front of his wife and daughter.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: DI Frost is frustrated to find himself working alongside DS Marsh, a former colleague who had him suspended after making a formal complaint about his handling of a case. However, the pair must put their differences aside and work together in order to investigate the abduction of a bus driver and his conductress and the murder of a childrens entertainer.

programme.desc: Unaware of his tragic obsession, Veronica falls in love with a 19th-century musician.

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Zane Zaminski is a radio astronomer who believes he has heard an extra-terrestrial signal, but whose discovery is deemed worthless by his boss. Then his research division is closed down due to government cutbacks and he is given the sack. Undeterred, Zane establishes a makeshift radio telescope within his own home and joins forces with fellow scientist Ilana Green to find out more about this alien lifeforce.

programme.title: Crank: High Voltage
programme.desc: After being kidnapped by a gang of Chinese mobsters, hitman Chev Chelios has his heart stolen and swapped with a battery-powered replacement. Chelios goes on a violent romp through LA to wreak his vengeance, but the artificial heart requires constant electric shocks to keep its owner alive.

programme.title: Mojave
programme.desc: A down-and-out artist has a dangerous and shocking encounter with an evil drifter in the desert, leading to terrifying consequences when the deadly stranger follows his unsuspecting victim home.

programme.title: Polar Storm
programme.desc: When a large comet fragment collides with the Earth, Dr James Mayfield discovers that the planets magnetic poles have shifted by 10 degrees, with catastrophic consequences for the future of all mankind. With the lives of his beloved wife and teenage son on the line, the only way James can save his family - and the world - is to try to realign the Earths axis with strategically placed nuclear weapons.

programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mom, Dad, Peppa and George decide to go to the beach on a beautiful sunny day. Suddenly, a little cloud covers the sun for a minute, but then it passes and the sun reappears.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends learn how to animate their drawings at playgroup.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George play at Granny and Grandpa Pigs house. Grandma, Peppa and George go to the shed to see what Grandpa is doing and discover that hes built a robot.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: While visiting Suzy and Emilys house, Peppa is surprised that there are extra rules which she does not have in her own house. On the drive home, Peppa explains to Mummy Pig that different houses have different rules.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: Queen Thistle reads the children a story, which inspires a question. They cant find the answer in the magic books in the castle, so go instead to the Wise Old Elf in the Great Elf Library.

programme.title: Ben and Hollys Little Kingdom
programme.desc: The children are at the Elf Farm, but to learn where milk comes from they must visit a big farm, to find cows. They travel to Lucy Bigs farm, where she shows them all the animals.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George go sailing with Grandpa Pig, but when he keeps getting stuck in the mud, they all decide to have a sleepover on the boat while they wait for the tide to come back in.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle sets the children a creative task - making masks. There are carrot masks, robot masks, and even pretty butterfly masks.The only thing missing is lots and lots of glitter!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: There is a new girl at school, and she quickly makes best friends with Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit. Molly shows them how good she is at digging while taking them on a tour of her underground house.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Its Richard Rabbits birthday party and George is invited. That can only mean one thing - soft play! George and friends have great fun, swinging, bouncing and climbing, but it isnt quite as much fun for the grown-ups!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies to get Mummy Rabbits attention. Mummy Rabbit plays along until they admit they are not really babies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cats Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings theyve done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard days work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesnt beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her familys adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pigs Garden. Grannys friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: Alvinnn!!! and the Chipmunks

programme.desc: Crossroads explores Sicilys ancient past when it was the breadbasket of the ancient and then medieval world and occupied by Greeks, Romans, Carthaginians, Arabs and Normans. (Part 1 of 2, S)

programme.title: Sicily: the Conquered Isle
programme.desc: Borderlands examines the islands role on the frontlines of a clash of civilisations during the Spanish era, when its glorious baroque buildings were also created. (Part 2 of 2, S)

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Positive climate tipping points; a supercomputer in Cheyenne, Wyo., shows how climate systems are predicted and analysed; a Michigan coal plant makes progress in the transition to renewables; climate challenges and vulnerabilities across the U.S.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The introduction of the steam railways in the early 19th-century changed Britain in a way no one could have predicted. In this episode, the team explore how they created a domestic revolution, changing the way we lived, from the houses we lived in to the food we ate.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team visit Beamish in County Durham to explore how the railway companies soon recognised that there was money to be made in moving people, rather than just stone, coal and iron. The comfort of the early passenger wagons are put to the test on one of the earliest steam trains, and Ruth finds out how people were moving further than ever before.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team find out how the railways transformed the British diet, rescuing a nation that was struggling to feed itself. Putting theory into practice Alex and Peter load a flock of sheep onto a train, discovering how the mass transportation of livestock by rail transformed the quality and quantity of meat available to Victorian consumers. This new capability gave birth to the traditional British roast.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: At the National Railway Museum, Alex and Peter help get the most famous locomotive in the world, the Flying Scotsman, into steam. The team take a ride of a lifetime as the loco travels along its original route, connecting the two most important financial capitals of the Empire, London and Edinburgh, and Alex finds out what it is like for catering staff with 250 hungry mouths to feed.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team head to the South Devon Railway to explore the life of the branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Ruth hand-milks a local breed of cow, and discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle. After undergoing an eyesight test, Victorian-style; Peter joins the footplate crew on the South Devon line. But it is not all plain-sailing when it comes to driving the milk train through the night.

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team find out how the combination of increased leisure time and affordable rail transport brought a new kind of freedom for working-class Victorians. Ruth travels along the beautiful south Devon coast from Paignton to Kingswear where she helps get a paddle steamer prepared for a journey up the River Dart.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: For Raj, the bells are ringing in Loughborough as they rally to the finishing line. But Natashas in the ring, fighting back, channeling the spirit of a Nottingham bare knuckle boxing legend.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Amanda and Julie have their work cut out reviving a sad dog that has been badly burned in a devastating house fire. The toy has been by owner Jodys side throughout her life, and when she saw her house being engulfed by flames, it was one of the first things on her mind. Now totally scorched, Jody would like her beloved toy to be restored so she can pass it on to her young son Noah.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Julie and Amanda welcome a stuffed monkey called Midge into the barn. Owner Charles received the toy primate as a Christmas present in the 1960s, but when he turned 14, his market trader dad put Midge to work on his Barnsley Market stall. To attract shoppers, the monkey hung from the stall whilst an invisible pulley waved his hand.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Metal expert Dominic Chinea takes on a toy carriage which originally belonged to a young boy born in 1911. Owner Jane inherited it from her father and remembers pulling it along and sitting on it as a child. Most of all, she recalls placing her stuffed toys carefully inside. Dom turns his hand to replacing the battered roof.

programme.desc: Angus is in Fife to dig through three generations of family clutter. They uncover a rocking horse and a collection of rare Beatrix Potter figurines.

programme.desc: Irita Marriott and her team use their expertise to launch Britains newest saleroom. What hidden gems will they find, and will they sell at auction?

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. First to arrive is a delicately carved set of clay sculptures, for the attention of ceramics expert Kirsten Ramsey. Owner Jackie treasures the figurines, lovingly crafted by her older brother Andrew who tragically died in an accident at the tender age of 18. After over 40 years on display, the unglazed figurines are crumbling and in dire need of repair.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: The team tackle three unusual projects, including a chair in which JFK once sat, a Walkman and a Royal Navy hat box filled with romantic love letters.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Amanda and Julie have their work cut out reviving a sad dog that has been badly burned in a devastating house fire. The toy has been by owner Jodys side throughout her life, and when she saw her house being engulfed by flames, it was one of the first things on her mind. Now totally scorched, Jody would like her beloved toy to be restored so she can pass it on to her young son Noah.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Toy restorers Julie and Amanda welcome a stuffed monkey called Midge into the barn. Owner Charles received the toy primate as a Christmas present in the 1960s, but when he turned 14, his market trader dad put Midge to work on his Barnsley Market stall. To attract shoppers, the monkey hung from the stall whilst an invisible pulley waved his hand.

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Today in the Repair Shop, Jay Blades and the team bring three treasured family heirlooms, and the memories they hold, back to life. Metal expert Dominic Chinea takes on a toy carriage which originally belonged to a young boy born in 1911. Owner Jane inherited it from her father and remembers pulling it along and sitting on it as a child. Most of all, she recalls placing her stuffed toys carefully inside. Dom turns his hand to replacing the battered roof.

programme.title: Massive Engineering Mistakes

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: When 27-year-old David Wahl disappears without a trace from a state park in Oregon, he leaves behind a distraught family and a host of unanswered questions. Months later and 100 miles north, Wahls body washes ashore. The death is ruled an accident, until a shocking admission by his girlfriend leads to criminal charges.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: The disappearance of seven-year-old Amanda Brown from her Florida home sparks a massive search effort by dozens of law enforcement agencies and hundreds of concerned citizens. While the search for the missing girl continues, investigators look into the history of the last man to see her alive, and make a chilling discovery.

programme.title: The Prosecutors: In Pursuit of Justice
programme.desc: The community of Dover, Delaware, is shocked when parts of a human body turn up across the city. Authorities determine it is one victim, but forensics experts struggle to identify the person while a hunt for the killer is conducted.

programme.title: Angel of Death
programme.desc: As the number of deaths at a medical centre climbs, the night staff begins to suspect that someone is poisoning the patients.

programme.title: Murderous Minds: Harold Shipman
programme.desc: Harold Shipman was an English general practitioner and serial killer. He is considered to be one of the most prolific serial killers in modern history, with an estimated 250 victims.

programme.title: Trevor McDonald and the Killer Nurse
programme.desc: Trevor McDonald investigates the case of serial child killer Beverley Allitt and reflects on how it was reported at the time. A combination of archive from the time, interviews with victims and expert analysis will piece together this tragic and shocking story.

programme.title: Who Killed Lt. Van Dorn?
programme.desc: The wife of the late Lt Wes Van Dorn seeks an explanation of her husbands death after the helicopter he was piloting crashes off the coast of Virginia.

programme.title: The CEO Killer: Deny, Defend, Depose
programme.desc: Delving deep into the lives of Brian Thompson and Luigi Mangione, exploring their contrasting backgrounds, the events that drew them into each others orbit, and the shocking manifesto Mangione released that sent the internet into chaos.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: The famous ports wealthy history has contributed to the prosperous underworld within, where the likes of Charlie Seiga, Curtis Warren and Shaun Smith thrived.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Looks back at the notorious Peaky Blinders, the flourishing gang culture in the sixties with links to the Krays, and how this culture continues today.

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: In the aftermath of ceasefire in Ireland, many militants turned to crime to make a living. Discover how residual anger on both sides led to unimaginable brutality.

programme.title: The Krays: The Myth Behind the Legend
programme.desc: Rivals and other contemporaries discuss gangsters Ronnie and Reggie Kray, who ran Londons East End.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: The chilling secrets of the Mafias most notorious kingpins are exposed in this compelling series. Mobster Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lucky Lucianos crimes with the Mafia, including bribing high-ranking officials, got him 50 years in jail. However, when WWII broke out, the USA needed Lucianos help.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on notorious mobsters. Joe Colombo loved fame and money and took on the FBI in the 70s, with his Italian-American Civil Rights League campaigning against harassment.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ambitious John Gotti became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the groups former head and earned the nickname Teflon Don after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafias Greatest Hits

programme.title: Great Crimes and Trials

programme.title: Germanys Mystic Forest
programme.desc: 2.000 rivers and streams dig deep into the underground and transport their water into reservoirs or Germanys Wild Amazon, the Wupper. These forests and rivers, together with heathlands and moors, are home to a diverse fauna. Martens, badgers, wild boars, hares, roe deer, and red deer, even black grouse and hazel deer find shelter in these parts. Wolves also have a dominant presence, not to mention those who live underground, such as lizards, bats, and snakes.

programme.title: Search for the Ghost Bears

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Louise Stoppani is looking for the father she never knew, having discovered aged seven that the man bringing her up was not her biological dad. Her real father was a teenage boyfriend of her mums whod wanted to be part of his daughters life at the beginning but had then disappeared and not made contact for nearly 40 years. Jonathan Gaskarth was adopted at six weeks old and had such a happy adoption that hed never felt the need to search for his birth mother or father.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?

Minnies parents were not married, and Minnie only discovered when she was older that her father had a wife and another family all the time Minnies parents were together. Minnie knows her father was awarded a medal for his role in the battle of Heligoland Bight during World War Two.

programme.desc: Tracking the history of Queens reign, from their humble beginnings to their meteoric rise to their rightful place as the champions of the world.

programme.title: Queen: Live at Wembley Stadium
programme.desc: Filmed in 1986, this was Queens first ever Wembley Stadium performance and broke all previous attendance records at the venue. It also proved to be one of the most spectacular musical performances of the time.

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: The Untold Story
programme.desc: The Untold Story enables us to reflect on this showmans career, sexuality and sensitivity. This documentary goes behind the wall and tells the untold story of Freddie Mercury.

programme.title: David Bowie: Serious Moonlight Tour
programme.desc: The singers 1983 Vancouver performance; includes "China Girl," "Heroes."

programme.title: Discovering David Bowie
programme.desc: Leading music critics and DJs discuss the the life, music, legacy and larger-than-life stage characters of the glam rock legend.

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: The singer-songwriter and his band perform the Grammy-winning Liquid Spirit - his biggest selling album yet - at Londons Middle Eight Hotel.

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: The singer-songwriter and his band perform the Grammy-winning Liquid Spirit - his biggest selling album yet - at Londons Middle Eight Hotel.

programme.title: 2 Fast 2 Furious
programme.desc: To clear his criminal record a former LA cop must infiltrate the Miami street-racing scene to set up a drug baron. Burning rubber all over the city with his ex-con friend, he attempts to deliver the crook to the FBI without crashing and being blown to pieces in one of the many explosions.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious: Tokyo Drift
programme.desc: Street-racing sequel following an adrenaline-junkie automobile addict who narrowly avoids jail by agreeing to move in with his father in Tokyo. However, he soon discovers the thrill of the local underground drift racing scene and unwittingly becomes involved with the Yakuza.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Fast Cars
programme.desc: Gear up for upcoming blockbuster Fast X and buckle in for a countdown of the best cars from each of the Fast and Furious films, from Brians Toyota Supra to Doms Dodge Charger.

programme.title: Fast and Furious
programme.desc: Dominic Toretto is forced to come out of hiding when a loved one is brutally murdered. Heading to LA to track down the culprit, he crosses paths with Brian OConnor, the FBI agent whose undercover infiltration of Torettos gang led to the motorised miscreants exile across the border. The two men temporarily put their differences aside as they investigate the killing.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 5
programme.desc: In Rio de Janeiro, ex-con Dom Torretto and ex-cop Brian OConner join forces against a corrupt businessman who wants them both dead.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 6
programme.desc: Since Dom and Brians heist in Rio they must live as fugitives. Meanwhile, Agent Hobbs has been tracking a gang of lethally skilled mercenary drivers. Hobbs asks Dom and his crew for help in exchange for full pardons for everyone.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 7
programme.desc: After defeating international terrorist Owen Shaw, Dominic Toretto, Brian OConner and the rest of the crew have separated to return to more normal lives. However, Deckard Shaw, Owens older brother, is thirsty for revenge. A slick government agent offers to help Dom and company take care of Shaw in exchange for their help in rescuing a kidnapped computer hacker who has developed a powerful surveillance program.

programme.title: Fast and Furious 8
programme.desc: The globetrotting crew faces an unexpected challenge when a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. Now, they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Fast and Furious Presents: Hobbs and Shaw
programme.desc: Brixton Lorr is a cybernetically enhanced soldier who possesses superhuman strength, a brilliant mind and a lethal pathogen that could wipe out half of the worlds population. Its now up to hulking lawman Luke Hobbs and lawless operative Deckard Shaw to put aside their past differences and work together to prevent the seemingly indestructible Lorr from destroying humanity.

programme.title: The Fast and the Furious
programme.desc: An undercover cop infiltrates a gang of LA street racers while investigating a rash of truck robberies.

programme.title: Open Season: Scared Silly
programme.desc: The humans and animals believe a werewolf is on the loose, so former hunter Shaw uses the opportunity to re-open the season. Boog, Elliot, and Mr Weenie have to face their fears and find the werewolf to get the season closed permanently.

programme.title: Rock Dog 3: Battle the Beat
programme.desc: Hoping to inspire a new generation of rock stars, Bodi joins a musical competition show and becomes an overnight TV personality sensation.

programme.title: The Ogglies
programme.desc: Young Max meets the Ogglies, a family of green, garbage-eating creatures who live at the dump in the town of Smelliville. When a contractor plans to build a wellness temple at the dump, Max and his pal must hatch a plan to save the Ogglies home.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: Based on the comic books.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie
programme.desc: Flightless birds lead a mostly happy existence, except for Red, who just cant get past the daily annoyances of life. His temperament leads him to anger management class, where he meets fellow misfits Chuck and Bomb. Red becomes even more agitated when his feathered brethren welcome green pigs to their island paradise. As the swine begin to get under his skin, Red joins forces with Chuck and Bomb to investigate the real reason behind their mysterious arrival.

programme.title: The Angry Birds Movie 2
programme.desc: Red, Chuck, Bomb and the rest of their feathered friends are surprised when a green pig suggests that they put aside their differences and unite to fight a common threat. Aggressive birds from an island covered in ice are planning to use an elaborate weapon to destroy the fowl and swine way of life. After picking their best and brightest, the birds and pigs come up with a scheme to infiltrate the island, deactivate the device and return to their respective paradises intact.

programme.title: Shark Tale
programme.desc: A fast-talking fish gains fame after taking credit for the accidental death of a shark mobster. While enjoying the popularity at first, his tall tale starts to unravel as others begin to suspect that he is not the Defender of the Reef after all, and when the sharks enemies get involved, his lies lead him into dangerous waters. A DreamWorks animation.

programme.title: The LEGO Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The citizens of Bricksburg face a dangerous new threat when LEGO DUPLO invaders from outer space start to wreck everything in their path. The battle to defeat the enemy and restore harmony to the LEGO universe takes Emmet, Lucy, Batman and the rest of their friends to faraway, unexplored worlds that test their courage and creativity.

programme.title: Monster Family
programme.desc: Draculas spell turns a woman and her loved ones into a vampire, a mummy, a werewolf and Frankensteins monster.

programme.title: Monster Family 2
programme.desc: Baba Yaga and Renfield are captured by a monster hunter so the Wishbone family once again transform into a vampire Frankensteins monster a mummy and a werewolf in a bid to free them.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Buffalo Kids
programme.desc: Arriving in New York City in 1886, two orphaned Irish siblings embark on a wild cross-country journey aboard a transcontinental train. They make a new friend and encounter heroes and villains in their quest to find a new home.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: Dragon Rider
programme.desc: A dragon, an orphaned boy, and a mountain spirit work together as they trek through the Himalayas in search for the Rim of Heaven.

programme.title: The Hangover Part III
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Doug take Alan on a road trip to help him through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie is given another makeover to become the face of the Bureau, prior to embarking on a promotional tour. When two of her friends are kidnapped - Miss USA and a beauty pageant director - she decides to investigate on her own, in defiance of orders to the contrary.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: Misfits realise their dreams of becoming cops when a mayoral decree forces the police academy to open its doors to all.

programme.title: Police Academy 2: Their First Assignment
programme.desc: Mahoney and friends have graduated from the Police Academy and are issued with their first assignments. As before, their cheerfulness and devotion to duty outweighs any shortcomings, but are they ready to do battle with a band of graffiti daubing terrorists?

programme.title: Police Academy 3: Back in Training
programme.desc: Slapstick farce with the incompetent cops as they set about saving their beloved academy from closure. Cutbacks mean that only one of the two police training schools can stay open, so Commandant Lassard appeals to the motley crew of graduates to come and train new recruits. However, the rival academy intends to sabotage their plans by cutting their training time down to a minimum.

programme.title: Little Fockers
programme.desc: Greg and Pam have been together for ten years, and now theyre the proud parents of two adorable twins. However, money is tight and in order to keep his family afloat, devoted nurse Greg takes a second job working for a drug company. That development doesnt sit well with Jack, whose previous suspicions regarding his hapless son-in-law soon come back in full force after learning of this development.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he wont let her go that easily.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: After 15 years in African bush country, Cady knows all about herd instincts, but nothing has prepared her for high school. She joins a popular but cruelly manipulative crowd of girls known as the `Plastics and secretly mocks them, but the fun stops when one betrays her and steals the boy she fancies.

programme.title: The School of Rock
programme.desc: After guitarist Dewey is kicked out of his own band, he pretends to be a teacher. When he hears the kids play, he realises they could be his support group in the Battle of the Bands, and hell finally get to be the rock star he knows hes destined to be.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abbas greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donnas pregnant daughter reunites with her mothers old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A woman drags her skeptical husband to a renowned counsellors marriage retreat to try to put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. However, his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what was lost.

programme.title: Luckiest Man In America
programme.desc: An ice-cream truck driver discovers a secret way to win as a contestant on the game show `Press Your Luck.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: With the German Army now just across the Channel, newly-appointed Prime Minister Winston Churchill must decide between negotiating a peace treaty with Hitler or standing firm. With the King, the public and his own political party all questioning his wisdom, the hard-drinking Churchill has to survive his own darkest hour and rally the country behind him.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: Parallel coming-of-age stories of a layabout `serial nice guy living a posh, carefree lifestyle off his deceased fathers fortune, and a bright but awkward youth whos tired of his mothers depressed, boyfriend-less state. Their paths collide when the boy fabricates a two-year-old son and joins a group called S.P.A.T. (Single Parents Alone Together).

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom falls for a charming neurosurgeon after she moves to Boston to chase her dream of opening her own business. However, when her first love suddenly reenters her life, her relationship gets upended, leaving her with an impossible choice.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Roxy Hart is sent to prison for shooting her lying lover. In prison she meets tabloid darling and headline singer, Velma Kelly, who is also in for a double murder. With the help of a slick Chicago lawyer, she learns to play the media game and vies for the valuable press attention that will get her out of jail.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music thats always been inside him.

programme.title: The Brutalist
programme.desc: Escaping postwar Europe, a visionary architect comes to America to rebuild his life, his career, and his marriage. On his own in a strange new country, he settles in Pennsylvania, where a wealthy and prominent industrialist recognises his talent.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedys assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: Iris finds her comfortable New York City life thrown into disarray after her closest friend and mentor bequeaths her a Great Dane named Apollo. Yet as Iris finds herself unexpectedly bonding with Apollo, she begins to come to terms with her past.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: The sequel to `Madagascar, in which New York Zoo animals, Alex the Lion, Marty the Zebra, Melman the Giraffe and Gloria the Hippo, still stranded on Madagascar, start to leave the island. All of a sudden, they land in the wilderness of Africa, where Alex meets the rest of his family, but has trouble communicating with them after spending so much time at the Central Park Zoo.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: The Hobbit: The Battle of the Five Armies
programme.desc: After the dwarves find and awaken Smaug the dragon, a battle arises to gain control of Erebor and the vast treasure inside. Meanwhile, Bilbo Baggins is in possession of a mysterious and magical ring.

programme.title: Pokemon Detective Pikachu
programme.desc: A young man joins forces with Detective Pikachu to unravel the mystery behind his fathers disappearance. Chasing clues through the streets of Ryme City, the dynamic duo soon discover a devious plot that poses a threat to the Pokemon universe.

programme.title: DC League of Super-Pets
programme.desc: Krypto the Super-Dog and Superman are inseparable best friends, now Krypto must convince a ragtag group of animals to master their own newfound powers to help him save Superman and the rest of the Justice League.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Paddington
programme.desc: A young Peruvian bear with a passion for all things British travels to London in search of a home. Finding himself lost and alone at Paddington Station, he begins to realise that city life is not all he had imagined - until he meets the kindly Brown family, who offer him a temporary haven.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop: the perfect present for his beloved aunts 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucys big celebration.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: A high school senior befriends a strange subterranean creature after building a monster truck from bits and pieces of scrapped cars.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Reformed criminals Mr. Wolf, Mr. Snake, Mr. Piranha, Mr. Shark and Ms. Tarantula find themselves hijacked into a high-stakes heist thats masterminded by a new team of delinquents they never saw coming -- the Bad Girls.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Violence has been outlawed in the politically correct regime of 2032, and the only weapons in existence are consigned to a museum, but when an escaped psychopath heads straight for the museum, the authorities decide the only effective recourse they have is to thaw out a violent, cryogenically frozen cop.

programme.title: The First Wives Club
programme.desc: When Brenda Cushman, Elise Elliot and Annie Paradis are reunited at the funeral of a college friend, they discover they have another thing in common: theyve all been dumped by their husbands, Morty, Bill and Aaron, for a younger model. Vowing revenge, they decide to hit them where it hurts most: the pocket. Using help and their various skills, they begin to pick them off one by on.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: Billy is the son of hotel chain magnate Brian Madison and expects to inherit the family fortune, but hes shocked when his father stipulates he wont unless he passes 12th grade in just 24 weeks. It will be tough, since he never passed 1st grade. Determined to prove his father wrong, Billy enrols at school.

programme.title: The Blues Brothers
programme.desc: The story of a pair of blues musicians who try to raise the money to save an orphanage by reuniting their old band - nearly writing off Chicago in the process.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: A fast-talking cop trails his best friends killer from the alleys of Detroit to the posh galleries of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop from the original film returns to Los Angeles to help solve another case. This time he must direct his efforts towards unraveling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by leather-jacketed punks. The investigation puts him on the trail of an illegal arms dealer and his hit lady.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Axel Foley and his Beverly Hills buddies investigate criminal activities at a Southern California amusement park.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: A disturbed undercover cop recovering from his wifes death is teamed up with a detective with a stable family background to crack an underground drug ring. The line between duty and off-duty begins to blur, however, when the daughter of one of the cops is kidnapped by the gun-toting heavies.

programme.title: Lethal Weapon 2
programme.desc: Psychotic LA cop Martin Riggs and his long-suffering partner Roger Murtaugh are assigned to guard an embezzling accountant due to testify before a federal commission. At first, they think it a routine piece of work, but they soon discover that their charge has been laundering money for the same South African narcotics syndicate they have been trying to crack.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Weather scientists Jo and Bill put marital problems aside to track a slew of devastating tornadoes raging through Oklahoma and stay one step ahead of their better-equipped but arrogant rivals. They have to get to the tornado first to be able to test a radical new device, by inserting it directly into the heart of the storm.

programme.title: High Plains Drifter
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger rides into a small frontier town in the American southwest, provoked into a gunfight in which he kills three men, and then begged by the townsfolk to become sheriff. The residents are terrified of the gunslinger but live in greater fear of a gang which intends to wipe out the whole town.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The UnXplained: Mysteries of the Universe
